full_text:
Use the D300e drug dispenser to dispense the different drugs. The protocol (‘Anti-TIGIT_normalized’) can be accessed from: P:\h345\afarkkilab\Projects\iPDC\Drug testing

Note that the additional volume in each well before dispensing the drugs should be 30 uL

Prepare the stocks for drug testing in a 384 well plate as follows:

0.75% Tween-20 in 1X sterile PBS (For stock preparation): Under the TC hood 75uL of 100% Tween-20 were added into 10mL of 1X sterile PBS. Use this solution to prepare the Pembrolizumab, Tiragolumab, and Cisplatin stocks in a final concentration of 0.3% Tween-20 in 1X sterile PBS.

0.3% Tween-20 in 1X sterile PBS (For dispensing and normalization): Under the TC hood, take 200 uL of the 0.75% Tween-20 in 1X sterile PBS and mix with 300 uL of 1X sterile PBS. Use this solution as indicated in the drug dispenser protocol for normalization purposes.

DMSO: Under the TC hood, aliquot 5 uL of sterile DMSO into an sterile Eppendorf tube.

Pembrolizumab 3.0 mg/ mL in 0.3% Tween-20:

Pembrolizumab A2005, LOT 5 (Sellechkem), stock concentration: 6.1 mg/mL

To prepare 3 mg/mL Pembrolizumab in 20 ul of 0.3% tween-20: take 9.8 uL of 6.1 mg/mL stock Pembrolizumab + 10.8 uL of 0.75% tween 20 1xPBS

Tiragolumab 2.5mg/mL in 0.3% Tween-20:

Tiragolumab stock concentration: 4.1 mg/mL

To prepare 2.5 mg/mL anti-TIGIT, in 20 uL of 0.3% tween-20: take 12,1 uL of stock anti-TIGIT + 7.9 uL of 0.75% tween 20 PBS.

Cisplatin 2 mM in 0.3% Tween-20:

Warm 10 mL of sterile water to 50°C.

Add 10 mg of Cisplatin into 5 mL of the pre-warmed sterile water for a final concentration of 6.6 mM. Allow the powder to dissolve by leaving the Falcon tube in the rotating incubator at 50°C for at least 10 min.

Once the cisplatin is fully dissolved, take 6.1 uL of the 6.6 mM cisplatin stock + 13.9 uL of 0.75% Tween-20 in 1X PBS.

Dilute WEE1i and ATRi to 100uM in DMSO from 1mM stock

1mM stock = 1 uL of 10 mM ATRi / WEE1i + 9 uL of DMSO

Prepare the stocks for drug testing in a 48 well plate as follows:

Prepare 9X stocks of each of the drugs so that 50 uL of each drug are added in the corresponding well. Final total volume per well after adding the drugs should be 450 uL. For example, for a layout like the following, the amounts to add of each liquid are indicated below:

Now, to prepare the stocks:

Cisplatin:

9X = 4.5 uM

From the 2 mg/mL stock prepared for the 384 well take 677.7 uL and mix with 322.3 uL of pre-warmed water. From this stock, make a 1:1000 dilution by taking 1 uL and mixing it with 999 uL of pre-warmed water. The 1:1000 dilution will be the 9X stock. If three conditions include cisplatin 0.5 uM, a total of 900 uL will be needed (50*6*3), so 1000 uL is fine.

Tiragolumab:

9X = 90 ug/mL

Commercial stock concentration = 4.1 mg/mL

From the commercial stock, take 28.5 uL and mix with 1271.5 uL of complete media. If four conditions include tiragolumab, a total of 1200 uL will be needed (50*6*4), so 1300 uL is fine.

Pembrolizumab:

9X = 45 ug/mL 
Commercial stock concentration: 6.1 mg/mL

From the commercial stock, take 5.9 uL and mix with 794.1 uL of complete media. If two conditions include pembrolizumab, a total of 600 uL will be needed (50*6*2), so 800 uL is fine.
